scope: brain-orb Phase 4 arc (full branch): KB writes (#61), transcript + post-session claude -p (#66), refresh loop (#67/#68), camera+navigate (#70), link validation (#71), selection (#72), Brain-tab postprocess config (#73)

attack_surface.exec_surface: post-session `claude -p` over the transcript, forked inside the agent action hook (stdin-fed, detached), gated by enabled-config + write flag

findings.title: prior 4a-only CSO report stale vs merged exec surface
action backend/agent timeout parity -> 504 double-write window
orb-tool postMessage handler lacked origin check (owner-write tools)
broker validates verb only; ids/paths delegated to agent (Inv #8)
outbound postMessage uses '*' (pre-existing Phase-3, out of diff)

verdict: SHIP — no critical/high; all medium/low fixed on-branch, info accepted/noted.
